parse.title: Traveling Cart
parse.text:
Traveling Cart
Open Hours: 6:00am to 8:00pm Friday and Sunday
5:00pm to 2:00am during Night Market
12:00pm to 2:00am during Desert Festival
Closed: Monday - Thursday, Saturday
Address: Cindersap Forest
Occupants: Traveling Merchant

The Traveling Cart is a shop that appears south of The Farm in Cindersap Forest on Fridays and Sundays, closing at 8pm. It also appears each day of the Night Market (Winter 15-17) and each day of the Desert Festival (Spring 15-17). Stock changes each day the Traveling Merchant appears. The merchant will sell a selection of ten random items in limited quantities (1 or 5 of each) as "standard stock", plus one piece of furniture at any one time. There may be an additional "special stock" item for sale as well.

Traveling Cart prices may vary from visit to visit. Prices are usually quite inflated, but every once in a while an item can be sold for less than its normal price. Do note that items are sometimes found for sale outside their normal seasons, which can be helpful for completing bundles.

The cart is pulled by a pig wearing a fez and spectacles. Interacting with the pig will result in it oinking at the character. During the Night Market, the pig floats behind the cart in an inner tube.

Contents

  • 1 Special Stock
  • 2 Spouse Portraits
  • 3 Standard Stock
    • 3.1 Cooked Dishes
    • 3.2 Crops & Foraging
    • 3.3 Seeds & Fertilizer

  • 5 Guaranteed Red Cabbage
  • 6 External Links

Special Stock[edit]

Note that the Coffee Bean and Rare Seed may also be sold during any season as Standard Stock.

Item Unit Price Season Notes
Rare Seed data-sort-value="1000">1,000g  Spring /  Summer 100% chance to appear.
10% chance for 5 stacks; 90% chance for 1 stack.
Rarecrow #4 data-sort-value="4000">4,000g  Fall /  Winter 40% chance to appear.
Coffee Bean data-sort-value="2500">2,500g  Fall /  Winter 25% chance to appear.
Red Fez data-sort-value="8000">8,000g  All 10% chance to appear.
Joja Furniture Catalogue data-sort-value="30000">30,000g  All 10% chance to appear if the Community Center Bundles have been completed.
Junimo Catalogue data-sort-value="70000">70,000g  All 10% chance to appear if either the Community Center Bundles or the Joja Community Development Form has been completed.
Retro Catalogue data-sort-value="110000">110,000g  All 10% chance to appear.
Tea Set data-sort-value="1000000">1,000,000g  All 5% chance to appear from Year 25 onwards.[1]
Stardew Valley Almanac data-sort-value="6000">6,000g  All 5% chance for one of the five skill books to appear.
Bait And Bobber data-sort-value="6000">6,000g  All
Woodcutter's Weekly data-sort-value="6000">6,000g  All
Mining Monthly data-sort-value="6000">6,000g  All
Combat Quarterly data-sort-value="6000">6,000g  All
Wedding Ring Recipe data-sort-value="500">500g  All Multiplayer only: 100% chance to appear until purchased.
Singleplayer: Does not appear.

Spouse Portraits[edit]

Once a villager becomes your spouse, or Krobus becomes your roommate, their portrait becomes available to buy. It will show up every time the Traveling Cart visits as long as you have 14 hearts with your spouse/roommate at the time. These portraits have a fixed data-sort-value="30000">30,000g price.

Spouse/Roommate Portraits
Abigail Portrait Alex Portrait Elliott Portrait
Emily Portrait Haley Portrait Harvey Portrait
Krobus Portrait Leah Portrait Maru Portrait
Penny Portrait Sam Portrait Sebastian Portrait
Shane Portrait

Standard Stock[edit]

Items not shown are not sold at the Traveling Cart. Items sold at the Traveling Cart are always of normal quality, never silver, gold, or iridium quality.

Furniture[edit]

Each piece of Furniture shown below has an equal chance of appearing in the Traveling Cart's stock (1/146 or 0.68%). The price for each will be between data-sort-value="furniture"250–2,500g.

Furniture not shown is not sold at the Traveling Cart.

Guaranteed Red Cabbage[edit]

If the Guarantee Year 1 Completable advanced option was enabled when creating the save, the traveling cart is guaranteed to sell Red Cabbage Seeds at least once in the first year, between spring 7 in Cindersap Forest (the cart's second visit) and winter 16 at the Night Market (the cart's 30th visit). The day is selected at random when the save is created. The guarantee only applies on that single day, even if the player doesn't check the cart or buy the seeds on that day.[2]

External Links[edit]

Players with access to their saved game files may find the "Stardew Predictor" utility helpful for predicting which items the Traveling Cart will offer each week, and during the Night Market. The utility is located at https://mouseypounds.github.io/stardew-predictor/.

Bugs[edit]

  • For the Android and iOS version of the game, after buying something from the cart and closing and reopening the shop menu, the item can be purchased again. This can be repeated indefinitely.

References[edit]

  1. ↑ See Content\Data\Shops.xnb. In the Traveler's section, the condition for the Tea Set to appear is YEAR 25, SYNCED_RANDOM day teaset .05.
  2. ↑ The game code initializes Game1.netWorldState.Value.VisitsUntilY1Guarantee in Game1::loadForNewGame, then decrements it for each traveling cart visit. Red Cabbage Seeds are guaranteed when the value reaches zero, after which it's decremented to -1 and no longer applies.

History[edit]

  • 1.0: Introduced.
  • 1.1: Added Coffee Bean for purchase.
  • 1.3.27: Added appearance at Night Market.
  • 1.4: Removed duplicate entries from Standard Stock. Removed Sweet Gem Berry, Void Egg, and Void Mayonnaise from potential standard stock. Added new items to standard stock: Brick Floor, Caviar, Flounder, Green Tea, Midnight Carp, Rice Shoot, Seafoam Pudding, Shrimp Cocktail, Tea Sapling, Triple Shot Espresso, Unmilled Rice.
  • 1.5: Added Oceanic Rug to possible furniture stock.
  • 1.6: Added appearance at Desert Festival. Spouse portraits, Joja Furniture Catalogue, Junimo Catalogue, Retro Catalogue, Tea Set, and skill books added to special stock.
  • 1.6.3: Ancient Seeds are no longer sold. Added Krobus Portrait.
